overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character travels along a canal under an overpass, crosses a busy intersection with holographic advertisements, and continues down a commercial street lined with colorful billboards and signage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete canal walkway beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: blue sports car parked along the curb
green military truck driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: murky green water flowing in a concrete canal channel
silver metal barrier separating walkway from the canal drop
massive concrete highway structure overhead with red support beams
white steam rising from a vent in the canal area ahead
collection of colorful neon signs and advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete canal walkway beneath an elevated highway overpass. Murky water flows on the left behind a metal guardrail while steam rises from vents ahead. Neon signs illuminate the right side of the path as various pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

events.description: exiting the covered canal walkway into the open intersection area
emerging from the shadow of the overpass into bright direct sunlight
crossing the marked crosswalk at the busy intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and crossing the marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: orange utility truck waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross
person with distinctive purple hair crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic advertisement projecting from a building facade
modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows rising in the distance
older brick structures with ground-floor shops and neon signage
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered canal walkway into a bright open intersection dominated by a large green holographic billboard. The character approaches and crosses a marked crosswalk as vehicles wait at the intersection. The environment shifts from the enclosed canal to a sunlit urban crossing with a mix of modern glass and older brick buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking along the green-painted sidewalk past various commercial storefronts and billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow and gray jacket walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: distinctive green painted pedestrian walkway running alongside the street
white metal guardrail separating the sidewalk from the building edge
neon signs and billboards extending over the street on building facades
traditional red paper lanterns strung across the street on wires

segments.scene_description: Walking along a distinctive green-painted sidewalk next to a busy street lined with dense neon billboards and commercial signs. The character moves through a vibrant urban corridor with overhead signage and red lanterns strung across the street, passing other pedestrians and vehicles while surrounded by towering buildings covered in advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed industrial canal into a vibrant, neon-saturated urban commercial district. It begins along a concrete walkway beneath an elevated highway overpass, where steam rises from vents and murky water flows behind a metal guardrail. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the enclosed space opens into a bright intersection dominated by a large green holographic billboard and sunlit glass buildings. The scene then shifts onto a distinctive green-painted sidewalk, moving deeper into a dense urban corridor lined with towering advertisements. Finally, the path leads under strings of red lanterns and overhead signage, surrounded by the glow of colorful billboards and the bustle of city traffic.
